ideas.title: CI flakiness triage + cargo/wasm build cache to lift the 77% pass rate
ideas.why: ci.success_rate=0.77 with 4 recent_failures means roughly 1 in 4 pipeline runs burns compute and blocks the self-improve daemon's CI-verify gate — the recurring Rust-compile reds deserve caching + a failure taxonomy, not just per-incident auto-revert.

ideas.title: ⌘K command palette with client-side full-text search over all posts
ideas.why: The site has posts.json + sitemap but no way to jump or search — a fuzzy ⌘K palette (Linear/Vercel-docs pattern) is the single most-bookmarked interaction on modern engineering sites and turns a linear blog into a navigable destination.

ideas.title: WebGL force-directed 3D knowledge graph of posts ↔ tags
ideas.why: The content stream (219 commits/7d) is accumulating posts with no visual map of how ideas connect — a spinning, clickable 3D tag graph (à la Obsidian's graph view / Nicky Case) is a genuine 'whoa' showpiece that also doubles as content discovery.

ideas.title: 'Ask this blog' RAG answers served off the idle Spark GB10 GPUs
ideas.why: Both spark nodes report gpu util=0 while router.cloud_hard=219 vs spark_today=3 — paid-for GB10 silicon sits idle as nearly all inference goes to cloud, so a small self-hosted embeddings+LLM RAG over the post corpus turns wasted capacity into a marquee interactive feature (backend on dgx-spark required).

ideas.title: Widen blog-logic tests beyond the 9 covered fns (edge cases: empty posts, bad dates, unicode slugs)
ideas.why: coverage_pct=100 over only coverage_fns=9 is false confidence — the gate is green precisely because untested surface isn't counted, the exact trap that let the malformed skip-link ship red.
